text:
Once upon a time in a quirky little town filled with talking animals, there lived a cheetah named Charlie. Charlie was the only cat with a passion for painting.

Every morning, you'd find Charlie sitting on an old fence, his pencil poised over blank canvases. He never sold a single painting, not even one with a picture of a cat chasing a fly.

That changed one lazy afternoon when a retired ballet dancer moved into the next-door cottage. She had beautiful feathers that were just waiting to be painted. Every time Charlie tried, they'd just flutter away.

Desperate, Charlie threw a party for all the birds he'd lost sleep over. To his astonishment, the feathered guests adored his work.

That night as he sloppily added details with eyelashes that blinked, his painting caught the dancer's eye. She bought it. Charlie danced madly, thinking victory was his.
